notes: Changed hosted Streamlit dependency to streamlit[auth] so st.login() installs the required Authlib authentication extra.
Removed the empty input-like bar above the login panel by replacing the custom HTML wrapper with a native Streamlit bordered container.
Changed logged-out status wording from public to download only, so it is clear this refers to page access rather than user data.
Kept beta/developer tools hidden unless the signed-in user has a verified email and the appropriate role.
